claimText: The Union Government is considering mandating the Advanced Driver Assistance System (ADAS) for all new models of trucks and buses, including school buses.
evidenceExcerpt: Union Government is considering mandating Advanced Driver Assistance System (ADAS) in all new models of trucks and buses, including school buses.
examUse: Statement-based question regarding recent government initiatives on road safety and commercial vehicle standards.
distractorHooks: Mandating ADAS exclusively for private passenger cars
Excluding school buses from the ADAS mandate
